song.title: O Come, O Come Emmanuel_Ben
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C#m F#m C#m O come, O come, Emmanuel . E B-F#m-C#m And ransom captive Israel . C#m F#m C#m That mourns in lonely exile here . E B-F#m-C#m Until the Son of God appear . B C#m F#m C#m Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel . E B-F#m-C#m Shall come to thee, O Israel
[V2] . C#m F#m C#m O come, O come, Thou Rod of Jesse, free . E B-F#m-C#m Thine own from Satan's tyranny . C#m F#m C#m From depths of hell Thy people save . E B-F#m - C#m And give them victory o'er the grave . B C#m F#m C#m Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel . E B-F#m-C#m Shall come to thee, O Israel
-!!
[V3] . C#m F#m C#m O come, Thou Day spring, come and cheer . E B-F#m- C#m Our spirits by Thine advent here . C#m F#m C#m Disperse the gloomy clouds of night . E B-F#m- C#m And death's dark shadows put to flight . B C#m F#m C#m Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel . E B-F#m-C#m Shall come to thee, O Israel
[V4] . C#m F#m C#m O come, Thou Key of David, come . E B-F#m - C#m And open wide our heavenly home . C#m F#m C#m Make safe the way that leads on high . E B-F#m-C#m And close the path to misery . B C#m F#m C#m Rejoice! Rejoice! Emmanuel . E B-F#m-C#m Shall come to thee, O Israel
